# AISG / Arena Battle Game dependencies
# Recommended Python: 3.10.x

# Core numeric + AI training
numpy>=1.26.0,<3.0
torch>=2.2.0

# gRPC networking + protobuf generated files
# proto/arena_pb2.py was generated with Protobuf Python Version 5.29.0
protobuf>=5.29.0,<6.0
grpcio>=1.68.0,<2.0
grpcio-tools>=1.68.0,<2.0

# Game UI / visualization
pygame>=2.6.0,<3.0

# Testing / development
pytest>=8.0.0,<9.0
